name: 15q24_recurrent_LCR15
description: 15q24 recurrent microdeletion/microduplication region flanked by five LCR clusters (LCR15q24A-E) of 60-200 kb at 95-99% identity. NAHR between A-D, A-E, B-D, B-E breakpoints generates ~1.7-6.1 Mb deletions encompassing CYP1A1/CYP1A2/COMMD4/MPI/PML and other dose-sensitive genes; phenotype: intellectual disability, dysmorphism, genital anomalies.

architecture.internal_structure: Five LCR15q24 blocks A-E (60-200 kb at 95-99% identity) flanking the unique core; NAHR between non-allelic pairs explains five common breakpoint configurations.
